education.details: Passed Praxis II and state Reading test

experience.title: Special Education Tutor
bullets: Modified curriculum, created accommodated assessments, inclusion support

skills_and_achievements: Common Core & NGSS-aligned instruction; differentiated/Special Ed supports and IEP accommodations; Positive Behavior Support (PBS); assessment (DRA2, Brigance, SBAC/NWEA prep); literacy workshop models; STEM/FOSS inquiry labs; curriculum design and small-group interventions; ed-tech (SMART tools, Go Math, Eureka/EngageNY, IXL, Khan Academy, Infinite Campus); strong home–school communication.
